skill.arcane_strike.name: Arcane Strike
skill.repel_charm.name: Repel Charm
skill.repel_charm.desc: Push an adjacent enemy back 2 tiles.
skill.spark_bolt.name: Spark Bolt
skill.spark_bolt.desc: Ranged: bolt of energy in a straight line, up to 3 tiles.
skill.ward.name: Ward
skill.ward.desc: Raise a shield that blocks the next hit.
skill.imp_claw.name: Claw
skill.imp_claw.desc: Melee: rake an adjacent target with claws.
skill.husk_slam.name: Slam
skill.husk_slam.desc: Melee: a heavy blow that also shoves the target back.
skill.wisp_bolt.name: Wisp Bolt
skill.wisp_bolt.desc: Ranged: a weak bolt fired from a distance, up to 3 tiles.
skill.thorn_volley.name: Thorn Volley
skill.thorn_volley.desc: Ranged: a barrage of thorns in a straight line, up to 4 tiles.
skill.hound_bite.name: Bite
skill.hound_bite.desc: Melee: a quick bite from an adjacent target.

ui.instruction_idle: Click a character, then click a highlighted tile to move, or a skill button below.
ui.instruction_armed: Click a highlighted tile to aim, or click the skill again to cancel.
